dateline: Goyang, South Korea — World Tour 'ARIRANG' Opens April 9, 2026
heroHeadline: BTS WORLD TOUR 'ARIRANG' Opens in Goyang — Largest K-pop Concert Tour in History Begins
heroSubtitle: 4,683 days since debut: BTS launched the ARIRANG World Tour on April 9, 2026 at Goyang Stadium (40,000+ fans, 360° stage, global live viewing in 35+ countries). Run BTS! 2.0 premiered April 7. ARIRANG held #1 on Billboard 200 for two consecutive weeks — a K-pop first. 85+ shows across 34 cities in 23 countries through March 2027.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, and Recording Academy.
